crossValidatedPatterns.label: Infrastructure Friction Loop

evidence.claude-code: Multiple sessions (12ebc646, 32861ca9, a02dcbdc, dd441a1c) end immediately upon encountering credit balance errors rather than resolving them
evidence.codex: Session a02dcbdc shows tool uninstallation (brew uninstall) in response to credit error — removing capability rather than fixing the underlying issue
evidence.openclaw: Session a843c829 shows escape/abort behavior upon OAuth token failure rather than troubleshooting

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Trigger: Attempting to begin substantive technical work using AI tooling — Consequence: Sessions terminate before productive work begins due to billing errors, auth failures, or rate limits — preventing the stated goal of AI-assisted development
crossValidatedPatterns.counterPressure: Sessions terminate before productive work begins due to billing errors, auth failures, or rate limits — preventing the stated goal of AI-assisted development

crossValidatedPatterns.label: Delegation Without Scaffolding

evidence.claude-code: Session 7a6b821c shows imperative command style with minimal specification and passive monitoring during AI execution for GitHub PR creation
evidence.codex: Session f837776a shows abstract-to-concrete problem delegation with low verbosity and high trust in assistant for building an AI agent
evidence.openclaw: Session e1432286 shows delegation of shell configuration (zshrc auto-start) to Claude, followed immediately by asking how to check what was done — suggesting the action was not personally understood

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Trigger: Starting a new AI-assisted project or workflow — Consequence: Minimal-instruction task delegation to AI with passive monitoring, but without building durable personal scaffolding — creating dependency without capability growth
crossValidatedPatterns.counterPressure: Minimal-instruction task delegation to AI with passive monitoring, but without building durable personal scaffolding — creating dependency without capability growth

crossValidatedPatterns.label: Aspirational Curation Without Consolidation

evidence.claude-code: Twitter bookmarks show saving of LLM fine-tuning guides, multi-agent architecture content, Baudrillard/AI philosophy, and Extended Mind Thesis content
evidence.codex: Multiple extraction analyses flag 'Bookmarks reflect aspiration or interest-signaling as much as genuine engagement' and 'saving ≠ reading ≠ applying'
evidence.openclaw: The deepML1 project (emotion classification, multimodal) is visible in session 700e3d04 but bookmarked technical content (LoRA, QLoRA, scaling laws) does not appear to connect to active implementation sessions

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Trigger: Encountering technically or philosophically interesting AI content — Consequence: Content is saved (bookmarked) but there is no evidence of integration, application, or output — accumulation of reference material that does not close the loop to practice
crossValidatedPatterns.counterPressure: Content is saved (bookmarked) but there is no evidence of integration, application, or output — accumulation of reference material that does not close the loop to practice

crossValidatedPatterns.label: Projection onto Atlas (AI agent project)

evidence.claude-code: Atlas is described as 'Fleet Intelligence Agent' — a coordinating intelligence over physical infrastructure, precisely what the subject appears to lack in their own AI tool usage (multiple broken sessions, failed auth, abandoned tools)
evidence.openclaw: Atlas configuration emphasizes structured role decomposition, security-first thinking, and constraint-bounded coordination — qualities that contrast with the subject's own pattern of minimal-specification delegation and session abandonment

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Type: golden_shadow. Systemic reliability and intelligent coordination projected onto Atlas (AI agent project).
crossValidatedPatterns.counterPressure: golden_shadow projection: Systemic reliability and intelligent coordination

crossValidatedPatterns.label: Projection onto Atlas security protocol / input validation constraints

evidence.claude-code: Atlas configuration repeatedly emphasizes security protocol and input validation as core operating rules across all openclaw source variants
evidence.openclaw: The subject's own sessions show minimal security hygiene: OAuth tokens fail, credentials are unclear across accounts, uninstallation is used as a blunt response to access problems

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Type: shadow. Security consciousness and rigorous input validation projected onto Atlas security protocol / input validation constraints.
crossValidatedPatterns.counterPressure: shadow projection: Security consciousness and rigorous input validation

crossValidatedPatterns.label: Projection onto Baudrillard/AI and Extended Mind Thesis bookmarks

evidence.claude-code: Bookmarked content explicitly bridges Baudrillard simulacra, Andy Clark's extended mind thesis, and David Chalmers with LLM architecture — a sophisticated dual-register intellectual framework
evidence.openclaw: The subject's actual AI interactions are uniformly instrumental and terse (CLI commands, single-line task delegation, SQL optimization queries) with no evidence of this philosophical framing in practice

crossValidatedPatterns.psychologicalInterpretation: Type: golden_shadow. Deep philosophical-technical integration projected onto Baudrillard/AI and Extended Mind Thesis bookmarks.

dominant.manifestation: Atlas project: operational AI in railway logistics
dominant.evidence: 57 Atlas mentions, security-first design, structured role decomposition

secondary.manifestation: SQL optimization, direct instrumental queries, pattern-based thinking
secondary.evidence: 35 SQL mentions, query optimization, CTE usage across sessions

emergent.manifestation: AI philosophy bookmarks, Extended Mind thesis, Baudrillard
emergent.evidence: Twitter bookmarks: philosophical-technical content not reflected in practice

goldenShadow.manifestation: Desired: seamless AI-human workflow without friction
goldenShadow.evidence: Atlas as idealized coordinating intelligence vs fragmented tool interactions

keyFindings: Operational AI deployment in industrial logistics
Delegation of cognitive load to AI

topPotentials.label: Tool Adoption and Abandonment Cycle
topPotentials.description: Cycle type: Sabotage. Initiation: Begin new AI tool session with a concrete task goal (PR creation, agent building, terminal configuration) → Friction encounter: Hit billing limit, auth error, or rate limit before task completes → Abort response: Exit session, uninstall tool, or attempt credential reset without systematic resolution
topPotentials.actionable: Friction encounter: Hit billing limit, auth error, or rate limit before task completes

topPotentials.label: Aspiration-Accumulation Without Integration Cycle
topPotentials.description: Cycle type: Avoidance. Exposure: Encounter high-quality technical or philosophical AI content on Twitter/YouTube → Curation: Bookmark or save content for later reference under organized categories (AI/ML, Philosophy) → Non-return: No evidence of revisiting, applying, or synthesizing saved material into active projects
topPotentials.actionable: Curation: Bookmark or save content for later reference under organized categories (AI/ML, Philosophy)

topPotentials.label: Delegation-Dependency Oscillation
topPotentials.description: Cycle type: Avoidance. High-trust delegation: Assign complex or configuration-level task to AI with minimal specification → Passive observation: Monitor AI execution without building personal understanding of what is being done → Capability gap discovery: Realize (e.g., asking how to check zshrc after Claude edits it) that the action was not personally internalized
topPotentials.actionable: Passive observation: Monitor AI execution without building personal understanding of what is being done

narrativeArc.tension: High ambition for AI-driven workflows meets persistent infrastructure friction and tool abandonment cycles
narrativeArc.resolution: Building Atlas as a domain-specific AI agent while developing personal scaffolding for sustained tool use

lifePhases.label: Tool Explorer
lifePhases.theme: Instrumental AI adoption with high friction

lifePhases.label: Agent Architect
lifePhases.theme: Atlas: operational AI in industrial logistics

directionalVector.summary: From fragmented tool use toward integrated AI-operational workflows anchored in the railway/logistics domain

modelLimitations: 40% of documents were too short for meaningful psychological inference
Emotional tone data is sparse — most interactions are purely technical
No personal/reflective writing in sources — only operational logs
IQ estimate not applicable — insufficient cognitive signal in this dataset
